message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a particular hotel. Its name is called express by holiday inn cambridge
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for 6 people and 5 nights starting from friday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a particular restaurant. Its name is called rice boat
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for the same group of people at 17:30 on the same day
Make sure you get the reference number
You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places
You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant by the booked time
Make sure you get contact number and car type
